title: Aureline change-object and worktree-lifecycle vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the change-object record family frozen in docs/vcs/change_stack_contract.md. One record family pins which change a surface is operating on (locally authored commit, commit imported from a remote authority, change authored by an AI branch-agent run, change imported from a patch bundle, or change synthesized during a history-edit operation), the bound worktree-lifecycle posture from the closed seven-value vocabulary so cross-worktree writes are mechanically forbidden, the change's authorship class, the immutable base identity and predecessor chain, the closed eight-value landing-state vocabulary, the recovery object minted before any topology-changing mutation (drawn from the closed five-value recovery_object_class vocabulary), the conflict-handoff class linking into the merge / conflict-class contract and the dedicated history-edit recovery contract (forward dependencies), the optional orphan-cleanup posture with the cleanup-export-then-archive subclass forced to cite an export ref before reaping, the rollback / export class vocabulary, the policy / trust envelope, and the audit-event row shape on the change_object stream. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw commit message bodies, raw patch bodies, raw run-log bodies, raw approval-ticket bodies, raw notebook cell text, raw terminal bytes, and raw URLs MUST NOT appear on any record emitted against this schema; the record carries opaque ids, typed vocabulary, redaction-aware reviewable labels (<= 1024 graphemes), and policy / freshness / authority / lifecycle state only. The eventual change-stack crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record kind, change_object_class, change_object_authorship_class, change_object_landing_state, worktree_lifecycle_state, recovery_object_class, conflict_handoff_class, worktree_orphan_cleanup_class, rollback_or_export_class, denial reason, or audit-event id is additive-minor and bumps change_object_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

change_object_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the change-object vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / claim manifests / portability exports. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw commit message bodies, raw patch bodies, raw run-log bodies, raw approval-ticket bodies, raw notebook cell text, raw terminal bytes, and raw URLs never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary for support / audit; never carries the raw payload. Exporters MUST apply broker-owned redaction (ADR-0007) before the value crosses this boundary.

redaction_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json (ADR-0011). Local-only change objects default to metadata_safe_default; AI branch-agent authored changes touching organisationally restricted state MAY raise to internal_support_restricted; change objects whose target touched a credentialed flow MUST raise to operator_only_restricted.

freshness_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json (ADR-0011). Used by the change-object's freshness chip; per-stack-member validation freshness lives in patch_stack.schema.json#validation_staleness_class.

workspace_trust_state_class.description: Re-exported from ADR-0018. A change object minted under unset_pending_decision MUST resolve through a trust prompt before topology-changing mutations are admissible; the schema enforces this through workspace_trust_unset_or_restricted denial.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under. ADR-0008 / ADR-0009 policy epoch and ADR-0001 / ADR-0018 trust state are re-validated on every restore and topology-changing mutation; a stale policy epoch denies the action with policy_epoch_expired_re_evaluation_required.

change_object_class.description: Frozen change-object class. commit_authored_locally is a commit / change authored on the user's own clone (authorship resolves to human_user_authored or pair_session_co_authored); commit_imported_from_remote is a commit fetched from a remote authority (authorship is whichever class the import chain reports); change_authored_by_ai_branch_agent is authored by an AI branch-agent run (authorship MUST resolve to ai_branch_agent_authored and ai_branch_agent_run_ref MUST be non-null); change_imported_from_patch_bundle is hydrated from an imported patch bundle (imported_patch_bundle_ref MUST be non-null); change_synthesized_during_history_edit is synthesized by a sequence-editor operation (authorship MUST resolve to synthesized_by_history_edit_operation and the row MUST cite a recovery_object_ref so a rollback to the pre-rewrite state is reachable).

change_object_authorship_class.description: Frozen change-object authorship class. Pairs with change_object_class through allOf gates: ai_branch_agent_authored MUST pair with change_authored_by_ai_branch_agent (and ai_branch_agent_run_ref MUST be non-null); imported_from_external_patch_bundle MUST pair with change_imported_from_patch_bundle; synthesized_by_history_edit_operation MUST pair with change_synthesized_during_history_edit.

change_object_landing_state.description: Frozen change-object landing-state vocabulary. submitted_review_* MUST cite a review_workspace_record (this schema never duplicates the review-state vocabulary). abandoned_orphan_pending_cleanup MUST pair with a non-null worktree_orphan_cleanup_class.

worktree_lifecycle_state.description: Frozen worktree-lifecycle vocabulary. worktree_in_sequence_edit denies cross-worktree writes through the cross_worktree_write_forbidden denial; worktree_paused_pending_conflict MUST pair with a conflict_resolution_packet_* conflict_handoff_class; worktree_archived_orphan_pending_cleanup MUST cite a worktree_orphan_cleanup_class.

recovery_object_class.description: Frozen recovery-object class vocabulary. Every topology-changing flow mints exactly one recovery object and pins its ref before the mutation begins. pre_mutation_local_history_checkpoint_minted resolves into schemas/recovery/local_history_entry.schema.json; pre_mutation_patch_stack_snapshot_minted resolves into schemas/vcs/patch_stack.schema.json#patch_stack_record (a snapshot ref pinning the pre-mutation ordered members); pre_mutation_combined_recovery_packet_minted cites two or more recovery surfaces.

recovery_object_ref.description: Opaque ref to the minted recovery object. Resolves into schemas/recovery/local_history_entry.schema.json or schemas/vcs/patch_stack.schema.json depending on recovery_object_class.

recovery_object.description: Pre-mutation recovery object. Required (non-null) on every change object whose change_object_class is change_synthesized_during_history_edit and on every change object that admits a topology-changing mutation; nullable otherwise.

conflict_handoff_class.description: Frozen conflict-handoff class vocabulary. Cross-link from a change object into the merge / conflict-class contract and the dedicated history-edit recovery contract (both forward dependencies). conflict_resolution_packet_* values pair with merge_conflict_class_record_id_ref once that contract lands; history_edit_recovery_packet_* values pair with history_edit_recovery_record_id_ref once that contract lands.

worktree_orphan_cleanup_class.description: Frozen orphan-cleanup vocabulary. cleanup_export_then_archive MUST cite a non-null exported_patch_stack_snapshot_ref before the orphan is reaped; silent reaping denies with worktree_orphan_silent_reap_forbidden.

rollback_or_export_class.description: Frozen rollback / export vocabulary. rollback_to_pre_mutation_recovery_object MUST cite the recovery_object_ref it is rolling back to (denies with rollback_or_export_recovery_object_required); export_ai_branch_agent_run_for_review MUST cite a non-null ai_branch_agent_run_ref; export_for_support_bundle MUST raise redaction_class to internal_support_restricted; import_patch_stack_snapshot_from_handoff MUST cite a non-null imported_from_patch_stack_snapshot_ref and an approval ticket.

change_object_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the change_object audit stream.

change_object_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the change_object stream. change_object_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a change_object_denial_reason.

workspace_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the workspace row in schemas/workspace/* the change is bound to.

branch_or_worktree_ref.description: Opaque ref to the single branch / worktree row the change pins. Raw branch names and raw absolute paths never appear here. A change object names exactly one branch_or_worktree_ref; a row that names two locators denies with cross_worktree_write_forbidden.

head_revision_id_ref.description: Optional opaque ref to the head revision the change is rooted on. Null until the change is pinned to a head.

local_locator.description: Local locator. The change object names exactly one workspace, one branch / worktree, and one worktree-lifecycle state.

ai_branch_agent_run_ref.description: Opaque ref into schemas/automation/run_record.schema.json#run_record. The run shape (model class, capabilities, tool calls, outputs) lives there; this row never duplicates it.

ai_branch_agent_envelope.description: AI branch-agent envelope. Required (non-null) when change_object_class is change_authored_by_ai_branch_agent and authorship is ai_branch_agent_authored.

imported_patch_bundle_ref.description: Opaque ref to the imported patch-bundle row. The bundle's source class, signing block, and provenance live on the bundle record; this row never duplicates them.

imported_patch_bundle_envelope.description: Imported-patch-bundle envelope. Required (non-null) when change_object_class is change_imported_from_patch_bundle.

base_identity_ref.description: Opaque ref to the base / parent identity the change is rooted on. Immutable for the change's life; a surface that retargets onto a new base resolves to a fresh change_object_record whose recovery_object_ref cites the prior change.

prior_change_object_id_refs.description: Predecessor chain of change-object id refs. Empty on a fresh change; non-empty when the change was rewritten / rebased / superseded. The successor's row records the chain rather than mutating the predecessor in place.

ai_branch_agent_envelope.description: Required (non-null) when change_object_class is change_authored_by_ai_branch_agent. Null otherwise.

imported_patch_bundle_envelope.description: Required (non-null) when change_object_class is change_imported_from_patch_bundle. Null otherwise.

recovery_object.description: Pre-mutation recovery object. Required (non-null) when change_object_class is change_synthesized_during_history_edit; required (non-null) when the change_object_landing_state is dropped_explicit_user_action, superseded_by_rewrite, or abandoned_orphan_pending_cleanup; nullable on a fresh local commit that has not yet admitted a topology-changing mutation.

worktree_orphan_cleanup_class.description: Required (non-null) when change_object_landing_state is abandoned_orphan_pending_cleanup or worktree_lifecycle_state is worktree_archived_orphan_pending_cleanup. Null otherwise.

exported_patch_stack_snapshot_ref.description: Opaque ref to the patch-stack snapshot the change was exported through. Required (non-null) when worktree_orphan_cleanup_class is cleanup_export_then_archive or cleanup_blocked_pending_export_for_handoff or when worktree_lifecycle_state is worktree_exported_for_handoff. Null otherwise.

imported_from_patch_stack_snapshot_ref.description: Opaque ref to the patch-stack snapshot the change was imported from. Required (non-null) when change_object_class is change_imported_from_patch_bundle and the import resolved through a patch-stack handoff snapshot; null otherwise.

approval_ticket_ref.description: Opaque ref to the approval-ticket row that admitted the most recent topology-changing mutation. Required (non-null) on rollback / export actions; nullable on local-only edits.

command_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the command-dispatch id under which the most recent mutation was invoked. Nullable on system-driven row mints; required (non-null) on rollback / export actions.

actor_ref.description: Opaque ref to the acting identity (the user, the AI run actor, or the import actor). Always non-null so the row remains attributable; co-authors travel through the collaboration session record when authorship is pair_session_co_authored.

archived_at.description: Required (non-null) when worktree_lifecycle_state is worktree_torn_down or change_object_landing_state is abandoned_orphan_pending_cleanup. Null otherwise.

merge_conflict_class_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the merge / conflict-class contract. Currently always null; once the conflict-class contract lands, every row whose conflict_handoff_class is conflict_resolution_packet_required_pending_decision or conflict_resolution_packet_admitted_user_resolved MUST cite the merge / conflict-class row that resolved the conflict.

history_edit_recovery_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the dedicated history-edit recovery contract. Currently always null; once the history-edit recovery contract lands, every row whose conflict_handoff_class is history_edit_recovery_packet_required_pending_decision or history_edit_recovery_packet_admitted_user_resolved MUST cite the history-edit recovery row that resolved the escalation.

allOf.description: ai_branch_agent_envelope is required (non-null) when change_object_class is change_authored_by_ai_branch_agent and MUST be null otherwise.
imported_patch_bundle_envelope is required (non-null) when change_object_class is change_imported_from_patch_bundle and MUST be null otherwise.

change_synthesized_during_history_edit MUST resolve change_object_authorship_class to synthesized_by_history_edit_operation and MUST cite a non-null recovery_object so a rollback to the pre-rewrite state is reachable.
abandoned_orphan_pending_cleanup landing-state MUST pair with a non-null worktree_orphan_cleanup_class.
worktree_archived_orphan_pending_cleanup lifecycle MUST pair with a non-null worktree_orphan_cleanup_class.

cleanup_export_then_archive and cleanup_blocked_pending_export_for_handoff MUST cite a non-null exported_patch_stack_snapshot_ref before the orphan is reaped; silent reaping denies with worktree_orphan_silent_reap_forbidden.
worktree_paused_pending_conflict lifecycle MUST pair with a conflict_resolution_packet_* conflict_handoff_class so a paused worktree is mechanically attributable to a conflict.

ai_branch_agent_authored authorship MUST pair with change_authored_by_ai_branch_agent class; imported_from_external_patch_bundle authorship MUST pair with change_imported_from_patch_bundle class; synthesized_by_history_edit_operation authorship MUST pair with change_synthesized_during_history_edit class.
imported_from_external_patch_bundle authorship MUST pair with change_imported_from_patch_bundle class.
synthesized_by_history_edit_operation authorship MUST pair with change_synthesized_during_history_edit class.

change_object_record.description: Row shape consumed by the diff explorer, the AI branch-agent panel, the patch-stack panel, the sequence-editor plan view, the import / export wizard, support / export, and audit lanes. Exactly one row per change-object identity.

rollback_or_export_class.description: Required (non-null) on change_object_rolled_back_to_recovery_object, change_object_exported_for_handoff, and change_object_imported_from_bundle event ids. Null otherwise.

denial_reason.description: Required (non-null) when change_object_audit_event_id_value is change_object_audit_denial_emitted. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: denial_reason is required (non-null) when the event id is change_object_audit_denial_emitted and MUST be null otherwise.

change_object_audit_event_record.description: Audit-event row on the change_object stream.
